bug_details.title: Conversation titles show IDs instead of meaningful text
bug_details.description: All 82 conversations in sidebar display as 'Conversation {8-char-id}' instead of generated titles from first user message

evidence.expected: Titles from first 50-60 chars of first user message

root_cause.source: Backend ChatServer generates title from conversation.id instead of first user message

current_workflow: BUG-001: Conversation titles show IDs instead of meaningful text

workflow_history.action: Starting bug fix workflow for BUG-001
Bug confirmed from QA report, proceeding to root cause analysis
Root cause identified: Backend ChatServer.ts line 422 generates ID-based title
workflow_history.root_cause_summary: Backend returns 'Conversation {id}' instead of generating title from first user message
